problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderLens AI: Explainable Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Intelligence System
summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender evaluation, ensures explainability, and produces auditable reports in the field of government procurement.
optimization_claims: Minimizes human error while retaining control
constraints_addressed: Existing workflows do not provide clear justification for eligibility decisions
